data.body:
Lot of work done by the word "credibly."

Trump can't credibly tell the time of day: Iran isn't counting on any promise from him.

And Iran can't credibly promise not close the Strait: If attacked again, it will do so again.

Any "deal" will simply be a fig-leaf. To let Trump pretend to have won.
